member.name: T:InfraFlowSculptor.Contracts.AppConfigurations.Requests.AddAppConfigurationKeyRequest
member.summary: Request to add a configuration key to an App Configuration resource.

member.name: P:InfraFlowSculptor.Contracts.AppConfigurations.Requests.AddAppConfigurationKeyRequest.Key
member.summary: The configuration key name (e.g., "Core:Authorization:ClientId").

member.name: P:InfraFlowSculptor.Contracts.AppConfigurations.Requests.AddAppConfigurationKeyRequest.Label
member.summary: Optional label for the configuration key.

member.name: P:InfraFlowSculptor.Contracts.AppConfigurations.Requests.AddAppConfigurationKeyRequest.EnvironmentValues
member.summary: Per-environment values for a static key. Null when using a reference.

member.name: P:InfraFlowSculptor.Contracts.AppConfigurations.Requests.AddAppConfigurationKeyRequest.KeyVaultResourceId
member.summary: Identifier of the Key Vault resource for a KV reference (null for non-KV keys).

member.name: P:InfraFlowSculptor.Contracts.AppConfigurations.Requests.AddAppConfigurationKeyRequest.SecretName
member.summary: The secret name in the Key Vault (null for non-KV keys).

member.name: P:InfraFlowSculptor.Contracts.AppConfigurations.Requests.AddAppConfigurationKeyRequest.SecretValueAssignment
member.summary: Determines how the secret value is assigned for a Key Vault reference. Valid values: "ViaBicepparam" or "DirectInKeyVault". Defaults to "DirectInKeyVault" if not provided.

member.name: P:InfraFlowSculptor.Contracts.AppConfigurations.Requests.AddAppConfigurationKeyRequest.VariableGroupId
member.summary: Optional identifier of the pipeline variable group this key belongs to. When set, the configuration key's value comes from a pipeline variable injected at deploy time.

member.name: P:InfraFlowSculptor.Contracts.AppConfigurations.Requests.AddAppConfigurationKeyRequest.PipelineVariableName
member.summary: The name of the pipeline variable within the variable group. Required when is set.

member.name: P:InfraFlowSculptor.Contracts.AppConfigurations.Requests.AddAppConfigurationKeyRequest.SourceResourceId
member.summary: Identifier of the source resource whose output is referenced (null for non-output keys).

member.name: P:InfraFlowSculptor.Contracts.AppConfigurations.Requests.AddAppConfigurationKeyRequest.SourceOutputName
member.summary: Name of the output on the source resource (null for non-output keys).

member.name: P:InfraFlowSculptor.Contracts.AppConfigurations.Requests.AddAppConfigurationKeyRequest.ExportToKeyVault
member.summary: When true, a sensitive resource output will be exported as a Key Vault secret.

member.name: T:InfraFlowSculptor.Contracts.Projects.Responses.GenerateProjectBootstrapPipelineResponse
member.summary: Result of bootstrap pipeline generation at project level.
member.param: Bootstrap pipeline files keyed by relative path, returned as a flat union. In SplitInfraCode layout, paths are prefixed with infra/ and app/ (e.g. infra/bootstrap.pipeline.yml, app/bootstrap.pipeline.yml). In AllInOne layout, paths are root-level (e.g. bootstrap.pipeline.yml). Kept for backward compatibility with clients that consume a single bucket.
Bootstrap pipeline files targeted at the infrastructure-flagged repository, keyed by repo-relative path (no infra/ prefix). Empty when no infra bootstrap was generated.
Bootstrap pipeline files targeted at the application-code-flagged repository, keyed by repo-relative path (no app/ prefix). Only populated in SplitInfraCode layout.

member.summary: Result of bootstrap pipeline generation at project level.
member.param: Bootstrap pipeline files keyed by relative path, returned as a flat union. In SplitInfraCode layout, paths are prefixed with infra/ and app/ (e.g. infra/bootstrap.pipeline.yml, app/bootstrap.pipeline.yml). In AllInOne layout, paths are root-level (e.g. bootstrap.pipeline.yml). Kept for backward compatibility with clients that consume a single bucket.
Bootstrap pipeline files targeted at the infrastructure-flagged repository, keyed by repo-relative path (no infra/ prefix). Empty when no infra bootstrap was generated.
Bootstrap pipeline files targeted at the application-code-flagged repository, keyed by repo-relative path (no app/ prefix). Only populated in SplitInfraCode layout.

member.name: P:InfraFlowSculptor.Contracts.Projects.Responses.GenerateProjectBootstrapPipelineResponse.FileUris
member.summary: Bootstrap pipeline files keyed by relative path, returned as a flat union. In SplitInfraCode layout, paths are prefixed with infra/ and app/ (e.g. infra/bootstrap.pipeline.yml, app/bootstrap.pipeline.yml). In AllInOne layout, paths are root-level (e.g. bootstrap.pipeline.yml). Kept for backward compatibility with clients that consume a single bucket.

member.summary: Bootstrap pipeline files targeted at the infrastructure-flagged repository, keyed by repo-relative path (no infra/ prefix). Empty when no infra bootstrap was generated.

member.name: P:InfraFlowSculptor.Contracts.Projects.Responses.GenerateProjectBootstrapPipelineResponse.AppFileUris
member.summary: Bootstrap pipeline files targeted at the application-code-flagged repository, keyed by repo-relative path (no app/ prefix). Only populated in SplitInfraCode layout.
